⚠️ (Update 23 March 2026) **!!!!!!READ HERE, YOUR ISSUE MIGHT BE CLOSED WITHOUT ANY COMMENT!!!!!!** DO NOT OPEN ISSUES FOR WINDOWS PROGRAMS NOT WORKING IN BOTTLES. Bottles is a Wine prefix manager. If a Windows application doesn't work, it could be a Wine problem or a misconfiguration of the Wine prefix. Please visit [WineHQ](https://www.winehq.org) and [ProtonDB](https://www.protondb.com) for more information on the software you are trying to run. For additional support, use the [Programs](https://github.com/bottlesdevs/programs) repository.
